rows.description: 10 to Landtax for ye year 1742. & 1743. 4s. paid
rows.notes: Amounts clear and agreed. Description '4s. paid' from gemini-flash chosen over '4l. Aid' from gpt-5-mini, verified against image. Both extractors correctly understood '4s. paid' as descriptive text, not an amount to be parsed into columns.

rows.description: 20 brought to Rect. wch was pd Newman for wine to entertain Coll. Ten't
rows.notes: Amounts clear and agreed. Description synthesized after gpt-5-mini's incorrect row split was corrected. Based on image, 'Rect. wch' and 'Ten't' are clearer than gemini-flash's 'Rect. w' and 'Ten?', and gpt-5-mini's 'acct wch'. Gemini-flash had correct amount for the combined logical row.
